name: poll-result
description: A Card component with optional code display for UI blocks.

files.content:
import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card" import { BadgeProps } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Progress, ProgressProps } from "@/components/ui/progress" const PollResultCard = () => { const pollResults = [ { id: "a", label: "A 30 Minutes", value: 55, color: "primary" }, { id: "b", label: "B More than 30 minutes", value: 20, color: "secondary" }, { id: "c", label: "C 1 Hour", value: 15, color: "success" }, { id: "d", label: "D More than 1 hour", value: 10, color: "warning" }, ] return (

Result of Poll

Here is the result for the latest poll

What is your daily mobile app usage like?

{pollResults.map((option) => (
{option.label} {option.value}%
))}
) } export default PollResultCard
